snp4.1:1.1: If one, longing for sensual pleasure,
snp4.1:1.4: The mortal gets what he wants.
snp4.1:2.4: he’s afflicted, as if shot with an arrow.
snp4.1:3.2: —as he would, with his foot, the head of a snake—
snp4.1:3.4:
this attachment in the world.
A man who is greedy
snp4.1:6.3: Letting them go, he’d cross over the flood
snp4.1:6.4: like one who, having bailed out the boat, has reached the far shore.
